goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'ely' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 15:00'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to ely and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on monday and should leave after 15:00
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get area and entrance fee
